---
title: "Random Methods Generator"
---
This app develops pieces of a methods section by filling in blanks from random lists of controlled vocabulary. This is not AI. Please don't take it seriously, or it'll self-destruct.

``` {=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tabler/icons-webfont@latest/tabler-icons.min.css">

<style>
  #adlib-app {
    --al-bg: #ffffff;
    --al-bg-secondary: #f5f5f4;
    --al-bg-tertiary: #eae9e6;
    --al-text: #1a1a18;
    --al-text-muted: #6b6b67;
    --al-border: rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    --al-border-strong: rgba(0,0,0,0.22);
    --al-accent-bg: #eff6ff;
    --al-accent-text: #1d4ed8;
    --al-radius-md: 8px;
    --al-radius-lg: 12px;
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    color: var(--al-text);
    max-width: 780px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 2rem 0 3rem;
  }

  @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    #adlib-app {
      --al-bg: #604B8B;
      --al-bg-secondary: #D0C2D5;
      --al-bg-tertiary: #2e2e2b;
      --al-text: #e8e8e3;
      --al-text-muted: #9a9a94;
      --al-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
      --al-border-strong: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
      --al-accent-bg: #D0C2D5;
      --al-accent-text: #604B8B;
    }
  }

  #adlib-app * { box-sizing: border-box; }

  #adlib-app select,
  #adlib-app textarea,
  #adlib-app button {
    font-family: inherit;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--al-text);
    background: var(--al-bg);
    border: none;
    border-radius: var(--al-radius-md);
    outline: none;
    transition: border-color 0.15s;
  }

  #adlib-app select {
    padding: 7px 10px;
    cursor: pointer;
    width: 100%;
    border: 0.5px solid var(--al-border-strong);
  }

  #adlib-app select:focus {
    border-color: var(--al-accent-text);
  }

  #adlib-app textarea {
    padding: 7px 9px;
    resize: vertical;
    line-height: 1.6;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--al-bg-secondary);
  }

  #adlib-app button {
    padding: 8px 20px;
    cursor: pointer;
    background: var(--al-bg);
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    font-size: 14px;
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }

  #adlib-app button:hover { background: var(--al-bg-secondary); }
  #adlib-app button:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

  #adlib-app .al-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.07em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--al-text-muted);
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  #adlib-app .al-divider {
    border: none;
    border-top: 0.5px solid var(--al-border);
    margin: 1.5rem 0;
  }

  #adlib-app .al-preview {
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.85;
    background: var(--al-bg-secondary);
    border: 0.5px solid var(--al-border);
    border-radius: var(--al-radius-lg);
    padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    color: #000000;
  }

  #adlib-app .al-blank-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--al-bg-tertiary);
    border: 0.5px solid var(--al-border-strong);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 1px 7px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
    color: var(--al-text-muted);
    vertical-align: baseline;
  }

  #adlib-app .al-vocab-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr));
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  #adlib-app .al-vocab-card {
    background: var(--al-bg);
    border: none;
    border-radius: var(--al-radius-lg);
    padding: 10px 12px;
  }

  #adlib-app .al-band-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 60px 10px 60px 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
    color: var(--al-text-muted);
  }

  #adlib-app .al-band-row input[type="number"] {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 4px 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
    background: var(--al-bg-secondary);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 5px;
    color: var(--al-text);
    text-align: center;
    outline: none;
  }

  #adlib-app .al-band-row input[type="number"]:focus {
    border-color: var(--al-accent-text);
  }

  #adlib-app .al-band-header {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 60px 10px 60px 1fr;
    gap: 6px;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--al-text-muted);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  #adlib-app .al-weight-bar-wrap {
    height: 4px;
    background: var(--al-bg-tertiary);
    border-radius: 2px;
    overflow: hidden;
    flex: 1;
  }

  #adlib-app .al-weight-bar {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--al-accent-text);
    border-radius: 2px;
    opacity: 0.5;
    transition: width 0.2s;
  }

  #adlib-app .al-output {
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.9;
    background: var(--al-bg);
    border: none;
    border-radius: var(--al-radius-lg);
    padding: 1.1rem 1.4rem;
  }

  #adlib-app .al-filled {
    background: var(--al-accent-bg);
    color: var(--al-accent-text);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 1px 7px;
    font-style: italic;
    font-weight: normal;
  }

  #adlib-app .al-gen-count {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
    color: var(--al-text-muted);
  }
</style>

<div id="adlib-app">

  <div style="margin-bottom: 1.25rem;">
    <label class="al-label" for="al-select">Template</label>
    <select id="al-select"></select>
  </div>

  <div class="al-preview" id="al-preview"></div>

  <hr class="al-divider">

  <p style="font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--al-text-muted); margin: 0 0 10px;">Controlled Vocabularies</p>
  <div class="al-vocab-grid" id="al-vocab-grid"></div>

  <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
    <button onclick="alGenerate()">
      <i class="ti ti-refresh" aria-hidden="true" style="font-size: 15px;"></i> Regenerate
    </button>
    <span class="al-gen-count" id="al-gen-count"></span>
  </div>

  <div id="al-output-wrap" style="display: none;">
    <hr class="al-divider">
    <p style="font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--al-text-muted); margin: 0 0 8px;">Result</p>
    <div class="al-output" id="al-output"></div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
(function () {

  var TEMPLATES = [
    {
      name: "Participants",
      template: "We recruited [NUMBER] participants through [RECRUITMENT METHOD]. Inclusion criteria required participants to be [AGE RANGE] years old and have experience with [RELEVANT EXPERIENCE]. Participants were predominantly [DEMOGRAPHIC CHARACTERISTIC].",
      vocab: {
        "NUMBER": {
          type: "weighted",
          bands: [
            { min: 1,   max: 40,   weight: 90 },
            { min: 41,  max: 100,  weight: 5  },
            { min: 101, max: 1000, weight: 5  }
          ]
        },
        "RECRUITMENT METHOD": ["social media advertising","university mailing lists","community flyers","snowball sampling","an online research panel","clinic referrals"],
        "AGE RANGE": ["18–25","18–35","25–40","30–50","40–60","18–65","21–45"],
        "RELEVANT EXPERIENCE": ["mobile app usage","digital health tools","remote work","social media platforms","wearable devices","online shopping"],
        "DEMOGRAPHIC CHARACTERISTIC": ["female (67%)","male (58%)","young adults under 30","college-educated (78%)","employed full-time","from urban areas"]
      }
    },
    {
      name: "Study design",
      template: "We used a [STUDY DESIGN] design with [NUMBER] conditions. Data were collected over [TIME PERIOD] using [DATA COLLECTION METHOD]. Statistical analyses were conducted using [ANALYSIS SOFTWARE].",
      vocab: {
        "STUDY DESIGN": ["between-subjects","within-subjects","mixed","randomized controlled","longitudinal","cross-sectional"],
        "NUMBER": ["two","three","four","five"],
        "TIME PERIOD": ["two weeks","one month","six months","a single session","three sessions"],
        "DATA COLLECTION METHOD": ["online surveys","in-person interviews","biometric sensors","screen recordings","experience sampling"],
        "ANALYSIS SOFTWARE": ["R","SPSS","Python","JASP","Stata"]
      }
    },
    {
      name: "Findings",
      template: "Results showed a [EFFECT DIRECTION] effect of [INDEPENDENT VARIABLE] on [DEPENDENT VARIABLE] ([STATISTIC]). This suggests that [INTERPRETATION]. However, [LIMITATION] should be considered when interpreting these findings.",
      vocab: {
        "EFFECT DIRECTION": ["significant positive","significant negative","marginal","strong","null"],
        "INDEPENDENT VARIABLE": ["task complexity","social presence","time pressure","user expertise","interface modality"],
        "DEPENDENT VARIABLE": ["task completion time","error rate","user satisfaction","cognitive load","engagement"],
        "STATISTIC": ["p < .05","p < .01","p = .08","p < .001","p = .12"],
        "INTERPRETATION": ["increased complexity impairs performance","familiarity reduces cognitive load","social cues enhance motivation","experience moderates the effect"],
        "LIMITATION": ["sample size","self-report bias","ecological validity","order effects","demand characteristics"]
      }
    },
    {
      name: "Reflexivity Statement",
      template: "As the researcher, I acknowledged my [POSITIONALITY] and reflected on how my [BACKGROUND] might influence the research process and findings. This reflexivity was maintained by [PRACTICE].",
      vocab: {
        "POSITIONALITY": ["positionality","bias"],
        "BACKGROUND": ["background","assumptions"],
        "PRACTICE": ["maintaining a reflexivity journal"]
      }
    }
  ];

  var current = 0;
  var genCount = 0;

  function escapeRegex(s) {
    return s.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
  }

  function isWeighted(v) {
    return v && typeof v === 'object' && v.type === 'weighted';
  }

  function pickWeighted(blank) {
    var vocab = TEMPLATES[current].vocab[blank];
    var bands = vocab.bands.slice();

    // read live values from inputs
    bands = bands.map(function (b, i) {
      var minEl = document.getElementById('al-bmin-' + blank + '-' + i);
      var maxEl = document.getElementById('al-bmax-' + blank + '-' + i);
      var wEl   = document.getElementById('al-bw-'   + blank + '-' + i);
      return {
        min:    minEl ? (parseInt(minEl.value, 10) || b.min) : b.min,
        max:    maxEl ? (parseInt(maxEl.value, 10) || b.max) : b.max,
        weight: wEl   ? (parseFloat(wEl.value)    || b.weight) : b.weight
      };
    });

    var total = bands.reduce(function (s, b) { return s + b.weight; }, 0);
    var roll  = Math.random() * total;
    var cumul = 0;
    var chosen = bands[bands.length - 1];
    for (var i = 0; i < bands.length; i++) {
      cumul += bands[i].weight;
      if (roll < cumul) { chosen = bands[i]; break; }
    }
    var lo = Math.min(chosen.min, chosen.max);
    var hi = Math.max(chosen.min, chosen.max);
    return String(Math.floor(Math.random() * (hi - lo + 1)) + lo);
  }

  function pickValue(blank) {
    var vocab = TEMPLATES[current].vocab[blank];
    if (isWeighted(vocab)) {
      return pickWeighted(blank);
    }
    var ta = document.getElementById('al-vocab-' + blank);
    var opts = ta ? ta.value.split('\n').map(function (s) { return s.trim(); }).filter(Boolean) : vocab;
    return opts.length ? opts[Math.floor(Math.random() * opts.length)] : blank;
  }

  function renderSelect() {
    var sel = document.getElementById('al-select');
    TEMPLATES.forEach(function (t, i) {
      var opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = i;
      opt.textContent = t.name;
      sel.appendChild(opt);
    });
    sel.addEventListener('change', function () {
      current = +sel.value;
      genCount = 0;
      document.getElementById('al-gen-count').textContent = '';
      document.getElementById('al-output-wrap').style.display = 'none';
      renderPreview();
      renderVocab();
    });
  }

  function renderPreview() {
    var t = TEMPLATES[current];
    var html = t.template.replace(/\[([^\]]+)\]/g, function (_, b) {
      return '<span class="al-blank-badge">[' + b + ']</span>';
    });
    document.getElementById('al-preview').innerHTML = html;
  }

  function updateBars(blank, numBands) {
    var weights = [];
    for (var i = 0; i < numBands; i++) {
      var wEl = document.getElementById('al-bw-' + blank + '-' + i);
      weights.push(wEl ? (parseFloat(wEl.value) || 0) : 0);
    }
    var total = weights.reduce(function (s, w) { return s + w; }, 0) || 1;
    for (var j = 0; j < numBands; j++) {
      var bar = document.getElementById('al-bar-' + blank + '-' + j);
      if (bar) bar.style.width = Math.round((weights[j] / total) * 100) + '%';
    }
  }

  function renderVocab() {
    var t = TEMPLATES[current];
    var grid = document.getElementById('al-vocab-grid');
    grid.innerHTML = '';

    Object.keys(t.vocab).forEach(function (blank) {
      var vocab = t.vocab[blank];

      var section = document.createElement('div');
      section.style.cssText = 'margin-bottom: 1rem;';

      var label = document.createElement('span');
      label.className = 'al-label';
      label.textContent = blank;
      section.appendChild(label);

      var box = document.createElement('div');
      box.style.cssText = 'overflow-y: auto; resize: vertical; min-height: 80px; height: 120px; padding: 6px 4px 6px 8px; border: 2px solid #604B8B; border-radius: var(--al-radius-md);';

      var ul = document.createElement('ul');
      ul.style.cssText = 'margin: 0; padding-left: 1.4em; font-size: 14px; font-family: Georgia, serif; color: #000000;';

      if (isWeighted(vocab)) {
        vocab.bands.forEach(function (band) {
          var li = document.createElement('li');
          li.style.cssText = 'margin-bottom: 3px;';
          li.textContent = band.min + '\u2013' + band.max + ' (' + band.weight + '%)';
          ul.appendChild(li);
        });
      } else {
        vocab.forEach(function (opt) {
          var li = document.createElement('li');
          li.style.cssText = 'margin-bottom: 3px;';
          li.textContent = opt;
          ul.appendChild(li);
        });
      }

      box.appendChild(ul);
      section.appendChild(box);
      grid.appendChild(section);
    });
  }

  window.alGenerate = function () {
    var t = TEMPLATES[current];
    var result = t.template;
    Object.keys(t.vocab).forEach(function (blank) {
      var re = new RegExp('\\[' + escapeRegex(blank) + '\\]', 'g');
      result = result.replace(re, function () {
        return '<span class="al-filled">' + pickValue(blank) + '</span>';
      });
    });
    genCount++;
    document.getElementById('al-output').innerHTML = result;
    document.getElementById('al-output-wrap').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('al-gen-count').textContent = 'Generated ' + genCount + ' time' + (genCount === 1 ? '' : 's');
  };

  renderSelect();
  renderPreview();
  renderVocab();

}());
</script>
```
